note_en: NYSE/Nasdaq full-closure dates for 2026 (verified via WebSearch, see ROADMAP §7.5). Scheduled tasks check today's US/Eastern date against this list before running Arena Autopilot — a match means no-op, no API calls wasted. Re-verify and update once a year.
note_zh: 2026 年 NYSE/Nasdaq 全休市日期（已 WebSearch 核实，见 ROADMAP §7.5）。定时任务跑 Arena Autopilot 前先核对今日美东日期是否在此列表——命中则直接 no-op，不浪费任何调用。每年更新核实一次。

holidays.name: Independence Day (observed — July 4 falls on Saturday)
